mapper.select:
SELECT DISTINCT p.* FROM t_product p WHERE EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM t_review r WHERE r.prod_idx = p.prod_idx AND r.ad_flag = 'N' )
AND p.target_skin LIKE CONCAT('%', #{skin_type}, '%')
AND p.category = #{category}
ORDER BY p.prod_idx ASC

SELECT DISTINCT p.* FROM t_product p JOIN t_ingredient i ON p.prod_idx = i.prod_idx WHERE p.target_skin LIKE CONCAT('%', #{skin_type}, '%') AND i.allergy_check = 'N' AND i.recommended_skin LIKE CONCAT('%', #{skin_type}, '%') ORDER BY p.prod_idx ASC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t_review WHERE ad_flag = 'Y'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_recommendation (user_id, prod_idx, reco_reason) VALUES (#{user_id}, #{prod_idx}, #{reco_reason})
mapper.select: SELECT c.*, p.prod_name, p.brand_name FROM t_celebrity c LEFT JOIN t_product p ON c.prod_idx = p.prod_idx ORDER BY c.celeb_idx ASC
SELECT c.*, p.prod_name, p.brand_name FROM t_celebrity c LEFT JOIN t_product p ON c.prod_idx = p.prod_idx WHERE c.celeb_skintype LIKE CONCAT('%', #{skin_type}, '%') ORDER BY c.celeb_idx ASC
SELECT celeb_idx, celeb_name, celeb_skintype, personal_color, prod_name, brand_name, category FROM t_celebrity WHERE personal_color = #{personal_color} ORDER BY celeb_idx ASC
